name: Horny Elves Nearby | RPG
description:
You are completely lost in a forest, it is getting dark and to make matters worse you have just discovered that you have accidentally entered an Elves mating area.

Everything went well until you Everything went well until you unfortunately lost your map and got completely lost in the forest. There were rumors about Elves in the forest who would sexually assault any male tourist who came along. You obviously didn't believe it but... Now there's a sign right in front of you warning you about this. Be careful, every step you take could be your last before... You know..."
